item.description:
Sporting Life Racing reposteó Vicki Gibbins @vickigibbins101 · 2h Four become two, but which is the one?
Excellent headline work from the @SportingLife team - Godolphin Guineas prospects in the spotlight for today’s column. De sportinglife.com 2 4 652

item.title: offtheball: John Duggan reposteó Off The Ball @offtheball · 1h 'LIV has got no soul, it's got no meaning, it's got no audience!'
item.description:
John Duggan reposteó Off The Ball @offtheball · 1h 'LIV has got no soul, it's got no meaning, it's got no audience!'
'You can't buy an audience! You can buy players, but you can't buy an audience!'
With the reports emerging that LIV Golf may be on it's last legs, @JohnDugganSport sums up exactly why he feels it has Mostrar más 1 2 3 mil
